ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-19-2018 Continued To Jul-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Yamaguchi in Propria Persona.

Mr. Yamaguchi stated that the next step in administering the estate is to apply for appointment of a Probate Referee, stated that he has an inventory prepared, that he prepared a 706 (tax returns), that he talked with Wells Fargo Bank and the brokerage account holder, and that he prepared a petition for final distribution. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration (subject to review of the order). Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for January 22, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for March 18, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
